settings.heading: What is Creative Zoo?
settings.text: A living world for apparel, characters, stories, sound, and community. This is the field guide for why the Zoo exists and where it is going.

settings.title: Built for the ones who make their own lane.
settings.text: Creative Zoo is not just a clothing line. It is a habitat for ideas that move between fashion, manga, music, sport, and everyday identity.

settings.title: Wear the world.
settings.text: Every drop should feel like part of a larger story: symbols, crews, rivalries, field notes, and future chapters.

settings.title: Always expanding.
settings.text: The ecosystem can grow through new collections, characters, music releases, journals, and community-led moments.

settings.heading: The Zoo is a system.
settings.text: Use these editable blocks to shape the full Creative Zoo manifesto over time.
